statusSection.title: Status
statusSection.footer: Full Access status is reported by the keyboard when it opens. If you just changed it in Settings, open the keyboard once in the field below to refresh.

enableSteps.title: Setup steps
enableSteps.footer: Allow Full Access lets the keyboard read the clipboard and connect to your server — it's required for syncing. Content is only sent to the server you configure.
enableSteps.step1: Open UniClip in Settings and tap Keyboards
enableSteps.step3: Turn on Allow Full Access and confirm

tryout.title: Try it
tryout.footer: Tap the field, then press and hold the globe key 🌐 and choose UniClip Keyboard. Once it opens, the status above refreshes automatically.
tryout.placeholder: Bring up the keyboard here to test

feedback.title: Key feedback
feedback.footer: Changes take effect the next time you open the keyboard.

share.title: Share

intro.footer: In any app, tap Share and choose UniClip to push content straight to your clipboard server — no need to copy and switch back to UniClip first.

favorite.title: Add to favorites
favorite.footer: Once added to Favorites, UniClip stays pinned at the front of the app row in the share sheet.
favorite.step1: Open any share sheet (tap the button below)
favorite.step2: Swipe the app icon row to the far right and tap More
favorite.step3: Tap Edit in the top right, then use ➕ to add UniClip to Favorites
favorite.step4: Drag it to the front and tap Done

share.tryButton: Open the share sheet to try

serverList.title: Servers
serverList.footer: Tap a server to edit its address, name, and credentials. Servers you add appear in this list.

connection.title: Connection
connection.footer: Allow Insecure Certificates is only needed when the server uses a self-signed HTTPS certificate; plain HTTP doesn't require it.

package.footer: The package contains app state and redacted log statistics. Clipboard contents, credentials, raw log messages, and native extension logs are excluded.
